CustomField.description: Cap on Maintenance Reserve for This Assembly: Specify the maximum limit to be accumulated. If there's no upper limit, leave this field blank. This field effectively overrides the Maintenance Reserve Cap (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Cap on Maintenance Reserve for This Assembly: Specify the maximum limit to be accumulated. If there's no upper limit, leave this field blank. This field effectively overrides the Maintenance Reserve Cap (Precise) field, which originally has a precision of six decimal places.
CustomField.label: Z_Unused_2406_Maintenance Reserve Cap
